allow: Bash(node -e "const p = require\(''pdf-parse''\); console.log\(typeof p.default, typeof p.pdf\)")
Bash(node -e "const p = require\(''pdf-parse''\); const keys = Object.keys\(p\); const funcs = keys.filter\(k => typeof p[k] === ''function''\); console.log\(funcs.slice\(0, 10\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const { PDFParse } = require\(''pdf-parse''\); const p = new PDFParse\(\); console.log\(Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(Object.getPrototypeOf\(p\)\).filter\(n => n !== ''constructor''\)\)")
Bash(node -e 'const { PDFParse } = require\(""pdf-parse""\); const p = new PDFParse\(\); console.log\(Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(Object.getPrototypeOf\(p\)\)\)')

Bash(node -e 'const { PDFParse } = require\(""pdf-parse""\); const p = new PDFParse\(\); const methods = Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(Object.getPrototypeOf\(p\)\).filter\(n => n !== ""constructor""\); console.log\(methods\)')
Bash(node -e 'const { PDFParse } = require\(""pdf-parse""\); const p = new PDFParse\(\); console.log\(Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(Object.getPrototypeOf\(p\)\).filter\(n => n != ""constructor""\)\)')
Bash(node --input-type=commonjs -e "const { PDFParse } = require\(''pdf-parse''\); console.log\(typeof PDFParse.prototype.loadPDF, typeof PDFParse.prototype.parse\)")
Bash(node --input-type=commonjs -e "const { PDFParse } = require\(''pdf-parse''\); const fs = require\(''fs''\); console.log\(PDFParse.toString\(\).slice\(0, 200\)\)")

Bash(node --input-type=commonjs -e "const { PDFParse } = require\(''pdf-parse''\); const fs = require\(''fs''\); const buf = fs.readFileSync\(''package.json''\); try { const p = new PDFParse\({data: buf}\); console.log\(typeof p.getText, typeof p.parse, typeof p.loadPDF\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\(''err:'', e.message\); }")

Bash(node --input-type=commonjs -e "const { PDFParse } = require\(''pdf-parse''\); const p = new PDFParse\({data: new Uint8Array\(10\)}\); const methods = Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(Object.getPrototypeOf\(p\)\); console.log\(methods\)")

Bash(node --input-type=commonjs -e "const { PDFParse } = require\(''pdf-parse''\); const p = new PDFParse\({data: new Uint8Array\(10\)}\); p.load\(\).then\(\(\) => p.getText\(\)\).then\(r => console.log\(typeof r, JSON.stringify\(r\).slice\(0,200\)\)\).catch\(e => console.log\(''err'', e.message\)\)")
